name: Iceland (Royal Standard, 1921–1944)

colors.symbolism: the field of the state flag
the cross fimbriation and central shield

description: The Icelandic state flag (swallow-tailed Nordic-cross flag) defaced in the centre with the crowned royal arms of the King of Iceland.
history: Royal standard of the King of Iceland — used during the personal union with Denmark (Kingdom of Iceland, 1918–1944) by the Danish monarch in his capacity as King of Iceland. The design dates from approximately 1921.

features.role: Royal Coat of Arms of Iceland (crowned)
